concerns.text: Task T021a (Oracle logic) and T021b (Annotation workflow) are listed BEFORE T019 (Unit tests for triplet construction). T019 explicitly depends on T021a ('depends on T021a'). While the dependency note exists, the task list order places the consumer (T019) before the producer (T021a) in the linear execution flow, violating the 'Producer before consumer' principle for the test harness setup. Tests should be defined after the logic they validate is established, or the dependency note is insufficient to override the linear ordering implication.

Task T030 (Adapter Policy Learner) is placed AFTER T026 (Save weights) and T027 (Evaluate model). T030 describes 'fine-tuning T5-small' to learn a correction policy. If T030 is a distinct training step (fine-tuning), it must precede T027 (Evaluation of the policy learner). If T030 is part of the initial training (T024), it is misplaced. Currently, the order implies evaluating a model (T027) before the policy learner (T030) is even implemented/fine-tuned, creating a logical gap in the artifact flow for the 'Model + Adapter + Policy Learner' configuration required by FR-004.

Task T020 and T020b (Integration tests for training) are listed AFTER T026 (Save weights) and T027 (Evaluate). T020 explicitly depends on T024 (Training loop). In a TDD/CI flow, integration tests for the training loop should logically follow the implementation of the loop (T024) but precede the final evaluation (T027) to ensure the training artifact is valid before evaluation. Placing them after evaluation breaks the 'Test before Deploy/Evaluate' flow implied by the 'Independent Test' sections.

Task T004a (Verify ground truth) is placed before T011 (Dataset fetcher). T004a requires verifying labels in the 'raw dataset'. T011 is the task that 'downloads EnterpriseClawBench... save to data/raw/'. The verification task (T004a) cannot execute before the data fetcher (T011) has populated the raw directory. The order must be T011 -> T004a.

Task T018 (Mann-Whitney U test) is placed after T017 (Generate features). This is correct. However, T018 depends on the output of T013-T015 (Feature extraction). The linear order is acceptable, but T018 should ideally be grouped with T017 as a 'Validation' step immediately following generation, which it is. No change needed, but ensure T018 is not skipped if T017 fails.
